details.notes: UUID operator precedence bug was fixed during scrutiny

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed UUID v4 operator precedence bug: hex[((Math.random() * 4) | 0) + 8] instead of hex[(Math.random() * 4) | 0 + 8]

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document atomic write pattern (writeAtomic with temp file + rename) in .factory/library/fs-patterns.md for future storage adapter implementations
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m1-storage-adapters review noted this pattern is well-implemented but not documented

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create .factory/library/typescript-strict-testing.md documenting common type safety patterns: non-null assertions in tests for array access, type assertions for Partial<T> updates
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple features required test fixes for TypeScript strict mode - non-null assertions (!) on optional properties in test expectations

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create SKILL.md for backend-worker documenting TDD workflow, port/adapter pattern, and Zod validation patterns
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m1-storage-adapters and m1-validators reviews noted backend-worker skill lacks documentation but workers successfully followed patterns
